message:
fix(channel): track polled state in mpsc Recv future; extend process cross-platform support

mpsc: Add a `polled` field to the Recv future struct to track whether
the future has been polled at least once, enabling correct waker
registration and cancellation detection in bounded channel scenarios.

process: Extend ChildStdout/ChildStderr with platform-conditional
from_std() and accessor methods. On unix, set_nonblocking uses the raw
fd as before. On non-unix (Windows), the no-op set_nonblocking stub is
called and as_raw_handle() is exposed instead of as_raw_fd(). This
completes the cross-platform process module work started in the
previous commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
